title: clerodendrum johorense
intro: Clerodendrum johorense, also known as Johore glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum johorense include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
